name: Feature request
about: Suggest support for a new CLI or a focused governance improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Request

Describe the feature or tracked CLI you want added.

## Why it matters

Explain the operational problem this would solve.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the expected audit or upgrade behavior.

## Sources

List official install docs, changelog pages, or registry sources if you have them.
